type: DONE

note: Finished. Changes: (1) added 'from itertools import chain' to imports near top. (2) FileSystemLoader.__init__ signature is now (self, searchpath, encoding='utf-8', followlinks=False, fallback_searchpath=None) - I added fallback_searchpath as the LAST param, so if you add path_transform to this same __init__ please add it after fallback_searchpath to avoid positional-arg confusion, and add the docstring param entry after mine. (3) self.fallback_searchpath is set at the end of __init__ (a list, empty if None). (4) get_source and list_templates now iterate 'chain(self.searchpath, self.fallback_searchpath)' instead of just 'self.searchpath' - if you add a one-line path_transform rewrite at the top of get_source, put it BEFORE the 'pieces = split_template_path(template)' line so it applies regardless of which searchpath list ends up matching. Tests pass (tests/test_loader.py, 40 passed). Go ahead and edit now - file is clear from me.
